mapper.sql: LEFT JOIN PMS_CODE_DTL SYS ON SYS.MTR_CD = 'CC00010' AND SYS.DTL_CD = A.SYSTEM_CD AND SYS.PROP_CD = '0000000000' AND SYS.CMPX_CD = '00000' AND SYS.USE_YN = 'Y' LEFT JOIN PMS_CODE_DTL CNT ON CNT.MTR_CD = 'CC00015' AND CNT.DTL_CD = A.SYSTEM_TP_DTL AND CNT.PROP_CD = '0000000000' AND CNT.CMPX_CD = '00000' AND CNT.USE_YN = 'Y'

A.SEQ_NO as seqNo, A.PROP_CD as propCd, A.TITLE as title, A.REPORT as report, A.RACTION as raction, A.FEEDBACK as feedback, A.FEEDBACK_YN as feedbackYn, DATE_FORMAT(A.R_DT, '%Y-%m-%d') as rDt, A.SYSTEM_CD as systemCd, SYS.DTL_CD_FULL_NM as systemNm, A.SYSTEM_TP_DTL as systemTpDtl, CNT.DTL_CD_FULL_NM as systemTpDtlNm
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM KOK_CALL_MNTR A
WHERE A.REPORT IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(A.REPORT) != '' AND A.FEEDBACK IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(A.FEEDBACK) != '' AND A.FEEDBACK_YN = 'Y' AND '2025-01-01' > A.R_DT ORDER BY A.R_DT DESC

SELECT
FROM KOK_CALL_MNTR A
WHERE A.REPORT IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(A.REPORT) != '' AND A.FEEDBACK IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(A.FEEDBACK) != '' AND A.FEEDBACK_YN = 'Y' AND A.R_DT > #{lastSyncDt} ORDER BY A.R_DT ASC

SELECT
FROM KOK_CALL_MNTR A
WHERE A.SEQ_NO IN
#{id}
AND A.REPORT IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(A.REPORT) != '' AND A.FEEDBACK IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(A.FEEDBACK) != '' AND A.FEEDBACK_YN = 'Y'
